title: malaxis novogaliciana
intro: Malaxis novogaliciana, also known as the New Galicia Malaxis, is a species of orchid native to Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Malaxis novogaliciana include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are used to harness its medicinal properties.
